/usr/bin/cc  -O3 CMakeFiles/cpg_example.dir/src/cpg_workspace.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg_example.dir/src/cpg_solve.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg_example.dir/solver_code/src/algebra_libs.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg_example.dir/solver_code/src/auxil.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg_example.dir/solver_code/src/csc_math.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg_example.dir/solver_code/src/csc_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg_example.dir/solver_code/src/error.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg_example.dir/solver_code/src/kkt.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg_example.dir/solver_code/src/matrix.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg_example.dir/solver_code/src/osqp_api.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg_example.dir/solver_code/src/qdldl.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg_example.dir/solver_code/src/qdldl_interface.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg_example.dir/solver_code/src/scaling.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg_example.dir/solver_code/src/util.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg_example.dir/solver_code/src/vector.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg_example.dir/solver_code/workspace.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg_example.dir/src/cpg_example.c.o -o cpg_example   -lm
